summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WHASABI AI-powered landing page chat system. All core functionality working correctly with mocked APIs as expected.

design_issues.issue: React console warning about duplicate keys in message components
design_issues.details: Non-unique keys may cause children to be duplicated - should use unique IDs for message keys

passed_tests: Backend /api/chat endpoint returns mocked AI response
Frontend loads correctly on external URL
Chat UI renders user input correctly
Input field clears after sending message
AI response displays with mocked content
Business header and branding display correctly
Input validation (disabled send button when empty)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Update React message keys to use unique identifiers to resolve console warning about duplicate keys in chat messages.
